title: Ben-`Ammiy #1151
definition:
Ben-ami = "son of my people"

 1) son of Lot, born to his second daughter, progenitor of the Ammonites
nasbUsage:
Definition: Ben-ami = "son of my people"

 1) son of Lot, born to his second daughter, progenitor of the Ammonites

    NASB:  son of my people, a son of Lot
